title: Stave Output Schema v0.1
description: Schema for Stave evaluation and verification output artifacts. Uses oneOf to distinguish evaluation results from verification (before/after) results.

oneOf.title: Evaluation Output
oneOf.description: Evaluation output: results from running controls against a set of observation snapshots.

kind.title: Output Kind
kind.description: Output kind discriminator. Value 'evaluation' indicates this is a standard evaluation run.

run.title: Run Metadata
run.description: Metadata about the evaluation run including tool version, timing, and input parameters.

tool_version.title: Tool Version
tool_version.description: Version of the Stave CLI that produced this output.

offline.title: Offline Mode Flag
offline.description: Whether this evaluation was run in offline mode (no network access).

now.title: Evaluation Timestamp
now.description: Effective evaluation timestamp (RFC 3339). May be capped to the last snapshot's captured_at.

max_unsafe.title: Max Unsafe Duration
max_unsafe.description: Maximum unsafe duration threshold used for this evaluation (e.g., 12h, 7d).

snapshots.title: Snapshot Count
snapshots.description: Number of observation snapshots loaded for this evaluation.

input_hashes.title: Input Content Hashes
input_hashes.description: Content hashes of input files for reproducibility verification.

files.title: Per-File Hashes
files.description: Map of input file paths to their individual content hashes.

overall.title: Overall Content Hash
overall.description: Combined hash of all input files for quick reproducibility check.

summary.title: Evaluation Summary
summary.description: Aggregate counts summarizing the evaluation results.

assets_evaluated.title: Assets Evaluated Count
assets_evaluated.description: Total number of assets evaluated across all controls.

attack_surface.title: Currently Unsafe Count
attack_surface.description: Number of assets currently in an unsafe state.

violations.title: Violation Count
violations.description: Number of findings that exceeded the max-unsafe threshold.

findings.title: Evaluation Findings
findings.description: List of control violations detected during evaluation.

items.title: Violation Finding
items.description: A single finding representing a control violation for a specific asset.

control_id.title: Control Identifier
control_id.description: Unique identifier of the violated control.

control_name.title: Control Name
control_name.description: Human-readable name of the violated control.

control_description.title: Control Description
control_description.description: Description of the unsafe condition detected by the control.

asset_id.title: Asset Identifier
asset_id.description: Unique identifier of the violating asset.

asset_vendor.title: Asset Vendor
asset_vendor.description: Cloud vendor of the violating asset.

source.title: Source File Reference
source.description: Source file reference for the asset definition.

line.title: Source Line Number
line.description: Line number in the source file.

evidence.title: Violation Evidence
evidence.description: Temporal and causal evidence supporting this finding.

remediation.title: Remediation Guidance
remediation.description: Remediation guidance for resolving this violation.

example.title: Remediation Example
example.description: Optional example of the remediation applied.

skipped.title: Skipped Controls
skipped.description: Controls that were skipped during evaluation (e.g., due to missing asset types).

control_id.title: Control Identifier
control_id.description: Unique identifier of the skipped control.

control_name.title: Control Name
control_name.description: Human-readable name of the skipped control.

skipped_assets.title: Skipped Assets
skipped_assets.description: Assets that were excluded from evaluation (e.g., by scope exclusion rules).

asset_id.title: Asset Identifier
asset_id.description: Unique identifier of the skipped asset.

matched_pattern.title: Matched Exclusion Pattern
matched_pattern.description: Exclusion pattern that matched this asset.

suppressed_findings.title: Suppressed Findings
suppressed_findings.description: Findings that matched a suppression rule. These were evaluated but excluded from the violation count.

items.title: Suppressed Finding Entry
items.description: A finding that was suppressed by a suppression rule.

control_id.title: Control Identifier
control_id.description: Unique identifier of the suppressed control.

asset_id.title: Asset Identifier
asset_id.description: Unique identifier of the suppressed asset.

remediation_groups.title: Remediation Groups
remediation_groups.description: Findings clustered by shared fix plan actions per asset. Reveals when multiple findings converge on the same remediation.

asset_id.title: Asset Identifier
asset_id.description: Unique identifier of the asset targeted by this remediation group.

asset_type.title: Asset Type
asset_type.description: Type of the asset targeted by this remediation group.

fix_plan.title: Fix Plan
fix_plan.description: The shared fix plan for all findings in this group.

contributing_controls.title: Contributing Controls
contributing_controls.description: Unique control IDs whose findings share this fix plan on this asset.

finding_count.title: Finding Count
finding_count.description: Total number of findings in this group (may exceed contributing_controls length when one control produces multiple findings).

extensions.title: Extension Data
extensions.description: Optional extension data for custom tooling integrations.

oneOf.title: Verification Output
oneOf.description: Verification output: results from comparing before and after observation snapshots to measure remediation progress.

kind.title: Output Kind
kind.description: Output kind discriminator. Value 'verification' indicates this is a before/after comparison.

run.title: Run Metadata
run.description: Metadata about the verification run including tool version, timing, and snapshot counts.

tool_version.title: Tool Version
tool_version.description: Version of the Stave CLI that produced this output.

offline.title: Offline Mode Flag
offline.description: Whether this verification was run in offline mode.

max_unsafe.title: Max Unsafe Duration
max_unsafe.description: Maximum unsafe duration threshold used for both before and after evaluations.

before_snapshots.title: Before Snapshot Count
before_snapshots.description: Number of observation snapshots in the before (pre-remediation) set.

after_snapshots.title: After Snapshot Count
after_snapshots.description: Number of observation snapshots in the after (post-remediation) set.

summary.title: Verification Summary
summary.description: Aggregate counts comparing before and after violation states.

before_violations.title: Before Violation Count
before_violations.description: Number of violations in the before (pre-remediation) evaluation.

after_violations.title: After Violation Count
after_violations.description: Number of violations in the after (post-remediation) evaluation.

resolved.title: Resolved Violation Count
resolved.description: Number of violations present before but absent after remediation.

remaining.title: Remaining Violation Count
remaining.description: Number of violations present in both before and after evaluations.

introduced.title: Introduced Violation Count
introduced.description: Number of new violations absent before but present after (regressions).

resolved.title: Resolved Violations
resolved.description: Violations that were present before remediation but are now resolved.

verification_entry.title: Verification Entry
verification_entry.description: A single entry in a verification result list (resolved, remaining, or introduced).
